response.global_analysis: 1. JSON Match: The audio perfectly matches the provided reference lyrics for the song 'SNAKE EYES', including the Korean sections. 2. JSON Usage: The Reference JSON was fully utilized for the song transcription and to identify the transition points to commentary and merchandise showcase. Manual transcription was used for the English and Japanese commentary segments. 3. Timing & Pacing: Timings are strictly anchored to vocal starts. Subtitles are split during noticeable pauses in Baelz's speech to maintain sync. Aggressive truncation was applied during the fast-paced rap sections of the song to prevent cascading delays.

subtitles.original: Fly high with pride and leave all fears behind!
subtitles.english: Fly high with pride and leave all fears behind!

subtitles.original: It's finally out!
subtitles.english: It's finally out!

subtitles.original: I hope you all enjoyed my new song, Snake Eyes!
subtitles.english: I hope you all enjoyed my new song, Snake Eyes!

subtitles.original: This has been such a long process in the making...
subtitles.english: This has been such a long process in the making...

subtitles.original: I can't even talk, I'm exhausted, but also I'm so happy it's finally out.
subtitles.english: I can't even talk, I'm exhausted, but also I'm so happy it's finally out.

subtitles.original: My newest song, Snake Eyes, was what I just performed.
subtitles.english: My newest song, Snake Eyes, was what I just performed.

subtitles.original: Not only is it the first time that I've written a lot of the lyrics from scratch for, you know...
subtitles.english: Not only is it the first time that I've written a lot of the lyrics from scratch,

subtitles.original: But also it's the first time choreographing a multi-member song with, you know, the two back dancers.
subtitles.english: but also the first time choreographing a multi-member song with the two backup dancers.

subtitles.original: I'm so happy! I did it!
subtitles.english: I'm so happy! I did it!

subtitles.original: I hope you guys enjoyed it.
subtitles.english: I hope you guys enjoyed it.

subtitles.original: Now, very important, pay attention.
subtitles.english: Now, very important, pay attention.

subtitles.original: The MV of this new song is also going to be premiering very soon after the live is over.
subtitles.english: The MV of this new song is also going to be premiering very soon after the live is over.

subtitles.original: And it is going to be my first ever 3D music video!
subtitles.english: And it is going to be my first ever 3D music video!

subtitles.original: やっとね、新曲がちょっとね、あの、公開した、ので、
subtitles.english: Finally, my new song has been released,

subtitles.original: めちゃくちゃ嬉しいです。
subtitles.english: so I'm incredibly happy.

subtitles.original: このあと、ライブの後ね、あの、初の3D MVもプレミアするので、
subtitles.english: After this live, my first 3D MV will premiere,

subtitles.original: 見てください！お願いします！
subtitles.english: so please watch it! I'm counting on you!

subtitles.original: 歌詞、え、英語の歌詞はほぼ、あの、自分で書いたので、
subtitles.english: The lyrics—I wrote most of the English lyrics myself,

subtitles.original: あと韓国語もね、あの、頑張ってたんで、あの、聞いてください！
subtitles.english: and I worked hard on the Korean part too, so please listen to it!

subtitles.original: Streaming should also begin shortly after as well.
subtitles.english: Streaming should also begin shortly after as well.

subtitles.original: It should be local time midnight. I never know anything, but it'll happen soon.
subtitles.english: It should be local time midnight. I never know anything, but it'll happen soon.

subtitles.original: So please make sure to check it out afterwards.
subtitles.english: So please make sure to check it out afterwards.

subtitles.original: I hope I did okay. I don't know, I was stressed about the choreography for a very long time, but...
subtitles.english: I hope I did okay. I was stressed about the choreography for a very long time, but...

subtitles.original: Now is the time!
subtitles.english: Now is the time!

subtitles.original: It's the thing you've all been waiting for!
subtitles.english: It's the thing you've all been waiting for!

subtitles.original: A merch showcase!
subtitles.english: A merch showcase!

subtitles.original: グッズ紹介に入りたいと思います！
subtitles.english: I'd like to get into the merchandise showcase!

subtitles.original: This is the lineup for this time!
subtitles.english: This is the lineup for this time!

subtitles.original: Baelz Hakos 2026 Birthday Live!
subtitles.english: Baelz Hakos 2026 Birthday Live!

subtitles.original: Birthday Merch! This is what the full set looks like.
subtitles.english: Birthday Merch! This is what the full set looks like.

subtitles.original: Birthday merch is what the full set looks like.
subtitles.english: Birthday merch is what the full set looks like.

subtitles.original: フルセットはこんな感じです！
subtitles.english: This is what the full set looks like!

subtitles.original: Let's look at them one by one.
subtitles.english: Let's look at them one by one.

subtitles.original: What do we have first? First up...
subtitles.english: What do we have first? First up...

subtitles.original: We have the [ReCOLOR] Rubber Mat!
subtitles.english: We have the [ReCOLOR] Rubber Mat!

subtitles.original: Look at that beauty!
subtitles.english: Look at that beauty!

subtitles.original: This illustration is of course by my beloved mama, Mika Pikazo sensei.
subtitles.english: This illustration is of course by my beloved mama, Mika Pikazo-sensei.

subtitles.original: 今年もね、書いてくださってありがとうございます。
subtitles.english: Thank you for drawing it again this year.

subtitles.original: I just thought, you know, my very first birthday merch also actually had a rubber mat in it.
subtitles.english: I just thought, you know, my very first birthday merch also actually had a rubber mat in it.

subtitles.original: And since, you know, I have a new outfit, I thought it was only fitting that we have another rubber mat...
subtitles.english: And since I have a new outfit, I thought it was only fitting that we have another rubber mat

subtitles.original: ...for me to switch out.
subtitles.english: ...for me to switch out.

subtitles.original: I really want this, so that's why I made it.
subtitles.english: I really want this, so that's why I made it.

subtitles.original: And you know, you can use it for Holocard...
subtitles.english: And you know, you can use it for Holocard...
